Package com.github.scribejava.oidc

Class OidcService

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.github.scribejava.core.oauth.OAuthService
      • com.github.scribejava.core.oauth.OAuth20Service
        • com.github.scribejava.oidc.OidcService
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    OAuth20AsyncOperations, OAuth20Operations, Closeable, AutoCloseable
    public class OidcService
extends OAuth20Service
    Service OIDC natif.

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      OAuth2AccessToken getAccessToken​(OAuth20Grant grant)
      OAuth2AccessToken getAccessToken​(String code, OidcSessionState sessionState)
      Retrieves the access token using authorization code and performs ID Token validation using session state.
      OAuth2AccessToken getAccessToken​(String code, String stateVal)
      Retrieves the access token using authorization code and loads session state for verification.
      CompletableFuture<OAuth2AccessToken> getAccessTokenAsync​(String code, OidcSessionState sessionState)
      Asynchronously retrieves the access token using authorization code and performs ID Token validation.

      Asynchronously retrieves the access token using authorization code and loads session state for verification.

      Generates the authorization URL using parameters from the provided OIDC session state.

      Generates the RP-Initiated Logout URL for this service.

      Gets the session state store.

      • sendAccessTokenRequestAsync

                                                                           OAuthAsyncRequestCallback<OAuth2AccessToken> callback)

        Parameters:
        request - request
        callback - callback
        Returns:

      • validateIdToken

        public IdToken validateIdToken​(OAuth2AccessToken token,
                               OidcNonce nonce)
        Parameters:
        token - token
        nonce - nonce (optionnel)
        Returns:
        IdToken validé

      • getIdTokenValidator

        public IdTokenValidator getIdTokenValidator()
        Returns:
        idTokenValidator

      • setIdTokenValidator

        public void setIdTokenValidator​(IdTokenValidator idTokenValidator)
        Parameters:
        idTokenValidator - idTokenValidator

      • getUserInfoAsync

        public CompletableFuture<StandardClaims> getUserInfoAsync​(OAuth2AccessToken token)
        Parameters:
        token - access token
        Returns:
        future

      • getLogoutUrl

        public String getLogoutUrl​(String idTokenHint,
                           String postLogoutRedirectUri,
                           String state,
                           String clientId)
        Generates the RP-Initiated Logout URL for this service.
        Parameters:
        idTokenHint - the ID token hint (ID Token issued during authentication)
        postLogoutRedirectUri - the URI to redirect the user to after logout
        state - the optional state value to include in the redirect URI
        clientId - the client identifier
        Returns:
        the logout URL, or null if the API or metadata is not configured/available

      • initSessionState

        public OidcSessionState initSessionState()
        Initializes and saves a new OIDC session state (including state, nonce, and PKCE code verifier).
        Returns:
        the newly created OidcSessionState

      • getAuthorizationUrl

        public String getAuthorizationUrl​(OidcSessionState sessionState)
        Generates the authorization URL using parameters from the provided OIDC session state.
        Parameters:
        sessionState - the OIDC session state to use for generating the authorization URL
        Returns:
        the authorization URL string

      • getAccessToken

        public OAuth2AccessToken getAccessToken​(OAuth20Grant grant)
                                 throws IOException,
                                        InterruptedException,
                                        ExecutionException
        Overrides:
        getAccessToken in class OAuth20Service
        Parameters:
        grant - the OAuth 2.0 grant
        Returns:
        the retrieved OAuth2AccessToken
        Throws:
        IOException - if network or serialization error occurs
        InterruptedException - if current thread is interrupted
        ExecutionException - if execution exception occurs

      • getAccessToken

        public OAuth2AccessToken getAccessToken​(String code,
                                        String stateVal)
                                 throws IOException,
                                        InterruptedException,
                                        ExecutionException
        Retrieves the access token using authorization code and loads session state for verification.
        Parameters:
        code - the authorization code
        stateVal - the state parameter value
        Returns:
        the retrieved OAuth2AccessToken
        Throws:
        IOException - if network or serialization error occurs
        InterruptedException - if current thread is interrupted
        ExecutionException - if execution exception occurs

      • getAccessToken

        public OAuth2AccessToken getAccessToken​(String code,
                                        OidcSessionState sessionState)
                                 throws IOException,
                                        InterruptedException,
                                        ExecutionException
        Retrieves the access token using authorization code and performs ID Token validation using session state.
        Parameters:
        code - the authorization code
        sessionState - the OidcSessionState containing nonce and code verifier, or null
        Returns:
        the retrieved OAuth2AccessToken
        Throws:
        IOException - if network or serialization error occurs
        InterruptedException - if current thread is interrupted
        ExecutionException - if execution exception occurs

      • getAccessTokenAsync

        public CompletableFuture<OAuth2AccessToken> getAccessTokenAsync​(String code,
                                                                String stateVal)
        Asynchronously retrieves the access token using authorization code and loads session state for verification.
        Parameters:
        code - the authorization code
        stateVal - the state parameter value
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture for the OAuth2AccessToken

      • getAccessTokenAsync

        public CompletableFuture<OAuth2AccessToken> getAccessTokenAsync​(String code,
                                                                OidcSessionState sessionState)
        Asynchronously retrieves the access token using authorization code and performs ID Token validation.
        Parameters:
        code - the authorization code
        sessionState - the OidcSessionState containing nonce and code verifier, or null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture for the OAuth2AccessToken

      • getSessionStateStore

        public OidcSessionStateStore getSessionStateStore()
        Gets the session state store.
        Returns:
        the OidcSessionStateStore

      • setSessionStateStore

        public void setSessionStateStore​(OidcSessionStateStore sessionStateStore)
        Sets the session state store.
        Parameters:
        sessionStateStore - the OidcSessionStateStore to use
